text.p: Is a pleasure writing this letter to you.
The main aim of my letter is to discuss about the poor state of roads in our town and also the dis consequences.

Mr Chairman i think if the road of our State will be reconstructed . it will be appreciated by every body because we are going to have a smooth Journey, and our state will be classify as the best, and it will reduce Road accidents.
And the consequences is that without reconstruction of Road Regular acc-ident will continue, and also and also there will be delay on the road before going to work or travelling.
Mr Chairman I think we will app-reciate if the poor state of roads will be reconstructed. And hoping that our request will be granted.
